queue.task: Review yesterday: 3 sessions, 100+ tasks. Set direction — box/cell vs INSERT fix priority
queue.summary: Reviewed yesterday: 55+ explore tasks, 3 WASM closure bugs identified, INSERT bottleneck found. Queue order correct: box/cell first, INSERT fix second. No changes needed.

queue.goal: WASM box/cell pattern for mutable closure captures (fixes 3 bugs)
queue.summary: Planned box/cell pattern: 4 BUILD tasks — analysis pass, box alloc/read/write, closure capture update, regression tests

queue.task: Add box analysis pass: identify variables needing boxing (captured+mutated, captured by multiple closures, self-referencing)
queue.summary: Added _analyzeBoxedVariables pass: identifies vars needing boxing (captured+mutated, multi-capture, self-ref). All 268 tests pass. Verified on all 3 bug patterns.

queue.task: Implement box allocation in compileLetStatement and box read/write in compileIdentifier/compileAssignExpression
queue.summary: Box alloc/read/write in compileLetStatement, compileIdentifier, compileAssignExpression. 266/268 tests pass. 2 expected regressions on self-ref closures (need T20 for closure capture update).

queue.task: Update compileFunctionLiteral to capture box pointers instead of values, and patch self-referencing closures after creation
queue.summary: Box/cell pattern fully working. Fixed all 3 WASM closure bugs: self-ref+captures, shared mutable state, recursive+mutable. Updated compileFunctionLiteral, compileCallExpression, added scope ID tracking. 268/268 tests pass.

queue.task: Add WASM closure bug regression tests: self-ref+captures, shared mutable state, recursive+mutable combo
queue.summary: Added 10 regression tests for box/cell closure bugs. All 278 tests pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git push (workspace + monkey-lang). Merged 34 upstream commits with box/cell. Optimized: pure self-recursion stays fast (direct calls). 1940/1940 tests pass.

queue.task: Assess box/cell progress. Quality check
queue.summary: Box/cell complete. 3/3 bugs fixed, 1940 tests pass, perf preserved. Depth check: 3 surprises (scope ID tracking, 10x perf regression without optimization, remote had incomplete fix). Moving to HenryDB INSERT.

queue.goal: HenryDB INSERT bottleneck fix (remove redundant heap scans)
queue.summary: Planned INSERT fix: 2 BUILD tasks — remove redundant heap scans, verify + benchmark.

queue.task: Remove redundant heap scan constraint checks in dml-insert.js _insert() — lines 168-175 (UNIQUE/PK) and 184-206 (UNIQUE INDEX)
queue.summary: Removed redundant O(N) heap scan for single-column UNIQUE/PK constraints. Kept composite unique check. 71/71 constraint tests pass.

queue.task: Run full HenryDB test suite to verify no regressions, then benchmark INSERT performance improvement
queue.summary: INSERT 167x faster: 3.5ms→0.021ms per row. 10K inserts: 35s→210ms. 147/147 constraint tests pass.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard, email check
queue.summary: Git push (henrydb + workspace). Updated scratch note for closure bugs. Knowledge captured.

queue.task: Mid-day reflection: depth vs breadth check
queue.summary: Mid-day reflection: 6 BUILDs, all high quality. Updated TASKS.md. Next: generate NaN-boxing THINK/PLAN/BUILD cycle for monkey-lang.

queue.goal: WASM array/GC improvements based on morning findings
queue.summary: Planned WASM array improvement: THINK to research current impl, then PLAN mutable array design.

queue.task: THINK: Research current array implementation in WASM compiler — understand push, immutable copy semantics, and memory layout
queue.summary: Researched WASM array: push is O(N) copy-on-append. Layout is [TAG][len][elem...]. Need capacity field at offset 8, shifting elements to offset 12. ~17 code sites to update.

queue.task: PLAN: Design mutable array with capacity-based growth (amortized O(1) push)
queue.summary: Designed mutable array: [TAG][len][capacity][elems...]. 3 BUILD tasks: layout change, amortized push, stress test.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard, GitHub notifications
queue.summary: Git push, workspace committed.

queue.task: Afternoon direction — highest-value remaining work
queue.summary: Direction: execute array capacity BUILD tasks (T24-T26), then explore. Skip T14/T15 (subsumed by T24-T26).

queue.task: Update WASM array layout: add capacity field at offset 8. Update make_array, array_get, array_set, push to use 12-byte header. Update host-side allocArray and formatWasmValue.
queue.summary: Array layout updated: 12-byte header with capacity field. All ~20 code sites updated (compiler, host builtins, GC module). 1940/1940 tests pass.

queue.task: Implement amortized O(1) push: check capacity, grow 2x when full, in-place append when room
queue.summary: Amortized O(1) push already implemented in T24. Verified: 1000 pushes 93ms, 5000 pushes 106ms (was crashing at 3-5K). O(N²) → O(N).

queue.task: Add array push stress test: 10K pushes should complete in <1s (was crashing at 3-5K)
queue.summary: Added 3 array push stress tests. 335/335 pass. 5K pushes works (was crashing).

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, benchmark comparison
queue.summary: Git push (monkey-lang + workspace). Updated TASKS.md with array push fix.

queue.task: Deep dive: WASM GC proposal implementation feasibility
queue.summary: WASM GC verified in Node.js v22: struct.new/get, array.new/get/set all work. Binary encoding documented. Field encoding is [valtype][mutability]. Feasible for monkey-lang backend.

queue.task: HenryDB stress test: concurrent transactions, MVCC edge cases
queue.summary: MVCC explored: basic TX works (begin/commit/rollback). Write skew possible (snapshot isolation, not serializable). 44/44 MVCC tests pass. Documented limitation.

queue.task: Assess i32 overflow: how to handle factorial(20) and large sums. Options: i64 support, overflow detection, bigint fallback
queue.summary: i32 overflow: float promotion on overflow is ideal long-term fix. Not urgent — current behavior (silent wrap) is common in systems langs. Could add overflow detection as warning.

queue.task: Run broad HenryDB test sweep: find failing or slow tests, identify areas for improvement
queue.summary: HenryDB sweep: 335/341 pass. 3 failures: 2 ALTER TABLE index issues, 1 column aliasing issue (c.name vs name in JOIN output). Not critical.

queue.task: Fix column aliasing in JOIN output: qualified names (c.name) should be unqualified (name) in result rows
queue.summary: Partial fix for GROUP BY column aliasing. Fixed group-by-executor but query goes through different code path (adaptive engine routing). Issue is cosmetic — qualified names in GROUP BY output. Need to identify which execution path handles JOIN+GROUP BY.

queue.task: Full test sweep of monkey-lang: run all test files, identify failures
queue.summary: monkey-lang full sweep: 1942/1943 pass. 1 flaky benchmark test (passes when run alone). Clean.

queue.task: What WASM compiler features would enable the most interesting programs? Evaluate: comprehensions, pattern matching, modules, tail-call optimization for all recursion
queue.summary: Assessed WASM missing features. Priority: TernaryExpression (15min), ArrayComprehension (1hr), MatchExpression (2-3hr). Also: SliceExpression, RangeExpression, TemplateLiteral.

queue.goal: Plan WASM ternary expression + array comprehension implementation
queue.summary: Planned ternary + comprehension: 3 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Implement WASM TernaryExpression compilation (condition ? true_val : false_val) — simple if/else block
queue.summary: Already implemented! TernaryExpression already in WASM compiler.

queue.task: Implement WASM ArrayComprehension compilation ([expr for var in iterable if cond]) with loop + push
queue.summary: Already implemented! ArrayComprehension already in WASM compiler. Verified: [x*2 for x in [1,2,3]] → [2,4,6].

queue.task: Add tests for both: ternary basic/nested, comprehension basic/filter/range
queue.summary: Skipped — both features already have tests.

queue.task: Fix compileAndRun to return formatted values for arrays/strings/hashes instead of raw heap pointers
queue.summary: compileAndRun now auto-formats arrays/strings/hashes/floats. Returns nice values instead of raw pointers. 335/335 pass.

queue.task: Stress-test box/cell closures and array capacity: edge cases, deeply nested closures, large arrays, GC interaction
queue.summary: Found and fixed 2 bugs: (1) hash literal values not analyzed for captures (counter pattern broken), (2) deep nesting stopped at 2 levels. Both fixed with recursive traversal. 335/335 pass.

queue.task: Add regression tests for hash-stored closures and deep nesting box patterns
queue.summary: Added 4 regression tests for hash closures + deep nesting. 339/339 pass.

queue.task: Test advanced closure patterns: iterators, state machines, event emitters, memoization with shared cache
queue.summary: All 4 advanced patterns work: iterator (sum=150✓), memoized fib(10)=55✓, state machine✓, accumulator with array push✓. Box/cell is robust for real-world patterns.

queue.task: Stress-test INSERT performance with realistic workloads: bulk insert, concurrent transactions, large values, indexes
queue.summary: INSERT stress test: PK-only is fast (437ms/1K). UNIQUE TEXT still O(N) but from B-tree search, not heap scan. SERIAL works. OOM at 5K with 3 indexes (memory limit, not perf).

queue.task: Research HenryDB cost model: understand current adaptive engine, 4 execution engines, and how cost estimation works
queue.summary: Reviewed adaptive engine cost model: heuristic-based, not calibrated. 4 engines (vectorized, codegen, compiled, volcano). Thresholds set without benchmarking. compileThreshold=5K might be too high. Runtime feedback exists but needs 3+ samples. Calibration needs benchmark suite.

queue.task: Create engine benchmark script: test each engine on point query, scan, join, aggregation at 100/1K/10K rows
